modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to launch WebEx due to access error message.

full_description_text:  
So, I was just trying to set up a WebEx meeting using USD, right? Everything seemed fine until I hit the launch button, and then bam! This error popped up saying, "your account does not have access to this webex site." I mean, I thought I had everything sorted out, but clearly, something's not right with the access. It's just super frustrating when you're all set to go and then hit a wall like this!
short_description: Unable to launch WebEx due to access error message.
